description: CodeFlow analysis whitelist - documents false positives and accepted patterns

whitelist.reason: DOM API methods, not SQL. Uses template literals for CSS selector strings (e.g., `.${styles.className}`), not database queries. This is a static site with NO database.
Static markdown documentation files authored by developer. Processed by Docusaurus at build time, never accept user input. No runtime HTML injection possible.

FIXED - Replaced innerHTML DOM manipulation with React state and JSX components. See XSS_FIX_SUMMARY.md
Used in Docusaurus page routing via dynamic import. Active in src/pages/curious-visitor/ pages.
Used in Docusaurus page routing. Dashboard wrapper for curious-visitor persona pages.
Used in Docusaurus page routing. Dashboard wrapper for tech-enthusiast persona pages.

whitelist.reason: Acceptable for small project. Data file imports component types/icons. To fix: move icon mapping to component.

notes.falsePo sitiveRate: ~70% of reported issues are false positives

notes.userInput: Only user input is EmailJS contact form (handled by third-party service with built-in sanitization)
